content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_m8kpojXmwh1qzwi7fo1_250.jpg)

I've been wondering why my 2-core machine has 4 graphs showing CPU usage. Now I know. It's [hyper-threading](http://apple.stackexchange.com/questions/54502/why-does-apple-activity-monitor-report-that-my-mac-with-a-dual-core-intel-i5-ivy).
